The Cat Nanny

Your cat deserves dedicated, professional care from someone who truly loves cats. Specializing in stress-free, in-home cat care — in your home or mine.

Call or Text to Book View Pricing
🐾
Free Meet & Greet! Before your first booking, I always offer a complimentary in-home meet-and-greet — so your cat and I can get acquainted before you ever leave town.
Schedule Yours

What We Offer

Everything Your Cat Needs

Every visit is tailored to your cat's routine — because familiarity is the key to low-stress care.

🍗

Feeding & Fresh Water

Meals on your cat's schedule, with fresh water always available.

🧼

Litter Box Care

Scooped and cleaned every visit so your home stays fresh.

🩶

Playtime & Enrichment

Wand toys, puzzle feeders, and plenty of love and attention.

💊

Medication Administration

Oral meds, subcutaneous fluids, and injections handled with care.

❤

Health & Wellness Checks

Watching for changes in behavior, appetite, or litter habits.

📸

Photo & Text Updates

Regular updates so you can relax knowing your cat is thriving.

🚗

Drop-In Visits

30, 45, or 60-minute visits in your home, on your schedule.

🌙

Overnight Stays

I stay at your home overnight so your cat never sleeps alone.

🏡

In-Home Cat Boarding

Your cat stays at my home in their own private, comfortable room.

Why HomePaws?

Cat care that feels like family

I'm not just a pet sitter — I'm a lifelong cat lover who understands that your cat is family. Every visit is personal, attentive, and centered around your cat's comfort.

Based in Chippewa Falls, WI, I serve a 30-mile radius and have experience with cats of all personalities — from social butterflies to shy introverts.

  • Fully insured & bonded
  • Experience with medical needs and special care
  • Consistent caregiver — no strangers in your home
  • Your cat stays in their own environment, stress-free
  • Free meet & greet before every new booking
"Your cat deserves the very best care while you're away — and that's exactly what I'm here to provide."
— The Cat Nanny, HomePaws Pet Sitting

Specialized Experience

Every Cat Welcome

From kittens to seniors, social to shy — I have experience caring for all kinds of cats.

Multi-Cat Households Diabetic Cats & Injections Subcutaneous Fluids Senior Cats Shy & Anxious Cats Oral Medications Special Diets Post-Surgery Care Hyperthyroid Management

Something Extra

In-Home Cat Boarding

Prefer your cat to have a cozy home away from home? I've got you covered.

🏡

Your Cat's Own Private Room — $60/night

I'm happy to welcome your cat into my home! They'll have their own dedicated space — a large, comfortable room stocked with everything they need to feel right at home.

  • 🛌 Private room — just for your cat
  • 🐒 All accessories provided (beds, toys, litter, scratching posts)
  • 🍳 Just bring their food and any medications
  • 📸 Daily photo updates so you can see them thriving
  • ❤ Calm, quiet home environment — no dogs

Good to Know

Cancellation Policy

Life happens — here's how I handle changes to bookings.

📅

48+ Hours Notice

Full refund — no questions asked.

⏳

24-48 Hours Notice

50% refund of the booking total.

🚨

Less Than 24 Hours

No refund — time has been reserved for your pet.

Where I Serve

Chippewa Falls & Surrounding Area

The service area covers Chippewa, Eau Claire, Dunn, Clark, and parts of Barron County. Not sure if you're in range? Just call or text!

Under 10 miles

  • Chippewa Falls
  • Lake Hallie
  • Tilden
  • Wheaton

10-20 miles

  • Eau Claire
  • Bloomer
  • Cornell
  • Cadott

20-30 miles

  • Stanley
  • Osseo
  • Mondovi
  • Boyceville

Travel fees may apply beyond 10 miles.
